data.seoTitle: Binance Will Remove the Seed Tag for BONK, EIGEN, ETHFI, PENGU & PEPE on 2025-07-21
data.seoDesc: Tokens with the Seed Tag represent new, innovative projects that may exhibit higher volatility and risks compared to other listed tokens.
